title: Hofer Ivory Unscented Pillar Candles - Set of 10, 5 x 8 cm, 18 Hour Burn Time, Dripless, Smokeless Wick, RAL Quality, Made in Austria
features: Dimensions of unscented pillar candles: Diameter 1.97 inches (50 mm), Height: 3.15 inches (80 mm). Fits any standard indoor candle holders and outdoor lanterns.
Material of decorative candles: High quality paraffin wax and white wick woven from cotton. Scent: Unscented. Cylinder candles are ideal for professional use in hotels, restaurants and catering.

Duration of small candles: +/- 18 hours long burning time completely smokeless and non toxic. High quality wax delivers a clean, non drip and lasting combustion. Decorative candles burn evenly with no soot or smoke and do not smoulder.

Packaging: Pack of 10 ivory candles in bulk. Perfect for home and kitchen decoration, wedding centerpieces decor, Christmas, Advent, Halloween, gift set, votive or prayer offering in church or emergency light source for power failure.

RAL quality mark: All Hofer block candles are made with the highest quality RAL certified raw materials and have undertaken not to use any pollutant-laden raw materials, paints or varnishes. Made in Austria.
description: Product description Hofer is the oldest Austrian wax maker. It offers a very wide range of professional candles dedicated to the catering and hotel industry. Hofer is recognized at European level for its high quality wax, therefore suitable for professional use. The use of high quality stearin and noble waxes means that Hofer candles are consumed evenly, slowly, without dripping and without producing any odor. Warm candlelight for many hours. With our pillar candles in appealing colors you can create a cozy atmosphere in no time. In our range you will find a wide variety of sizes of pillar candles: from the small pillar set for the Advent wreath to the particularly large pillar candles used in churches. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Dispose of candle and container properly.

specifications_table.Specific Uses: ‎Decoration, Celebration, Religious Activity, Emergency, Heating, Indoor use, Outdoor use, General purpose
specifications_table.Special features: ‎Burn time approx. 18 Hours, No Drip, No soot or smoke, RAL Quality Mark for Candles, Unscented
